query:
-- Mevcut hedefleri temizle (2026/3 dönemi için)
DELETE FROM kpi_targets WHERE period = '2026/3';

-- KPI hedefleri yükle
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (
  branch_id, 
  period, 
  kpi_name, 
  dimension, 
  target_value, 
  target_lower_limit, 
  target_upper_limit, 
  weight, 
  unit, 
  frequency, 
  source, 
  created_at
) 
SELECT 
  b.id,
  '2026/3',
  'Ciro /Hamburger Adedi',
  'Finans',
  6800000.0,
  5440000.0,
  7820000.0,
  15,
  'TL',
  'Aylık',
  'Sistem',
  NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE b.name = 'BY İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY'
LIMIT 1;
